title: Where in Monday.com is the time that the “My Highlights (daily email)” emails distribute?
excerpt: Presently, the daily highlights email is intended to go out around 9:00  for all of our users. Sometimes this can be a bit delayed or a few hours later, but the goal we would like is 9:00 am. At this time Monday.com does…

posts.author: Clu (Luke McCabe)
posts.cookedHtml: Presently, the daily highlights email is intended to go out around 9:00 for all of our users. Sometimes this can be a bit delayed or a few hours later, but the goal we would like is 9:00 am. At this time Monday.com does not have the ability for our company to change the time the emails are released.
